name: Largest Directories
description: Listet die größten Unterordner im aktuellen Verzeichnis auf.

commands.cmd: powershell "Get-ChildItem -Directory | ForEach-Object { $size = (Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum).Sum; [PSCustomObject]@{Name=$_.Name; SizeMB=[math]::Round($size/1MB,2)} } | Sort-Object SizeMB -Descending | Select-Object -First 20"
commands.powershell: Get-ChildItem -Directory | ForEach-Object { $size = (Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum).Sum; [PSCustomObject]@{Name=$_.Name; SizeMB=[math]::Round($size/1MB,2)} } | Sort-Object SizeMB -Descending | Select-Object -First 20
